reviews.review_description: Epic fun and great graphics.

reviews.review_title: Hits the spot for tower defence
reviews.review_description: If you've been looking for a fun little tower defence game that's polished, has adjustable challenge ratings, cute/cool little minions, fun spell-like powers, and a good bit of customisation of the towers, this game scratches that itch.
Great game and good graphics. Very fun to play but as soon as I begin to beat the first wave of the 2nd island the game kicks me out and I have to restart every time😔

reviews.review_title: Impossible to play on Meta Quest 3S
reviews.review_description:
The gesture to swap workers does not work, so you can only buy archers. In this way, the second level is impossible to complete.

Sometimes the games crashes.

It's a pity because the game seems potentially very fun

The game is very well made and fun to play with. One can build different towers by stacking different builders on top of each other, which I find quite neat and unique. It's also well made for VR as one can take damaging energy balls and throw them on the path, making it a more immersive experience. I'm at level 10 at the moment and can imagine that 15 levels might feel a bit short in the end. I hope the developers either add more levels or develop a sequel to this lovely game.

Overall, I definitely recommend this game to any tower defense and/or VR enthusiasts ☺️

I hope they expand this in future! I'm on level 4 and haven't encountered any issues so far.

Almost completed! It's quite easy once you figure out a few things but really enjoyed playing this! Really hope they add to this or do a second one.

Update: completed, very enjoyable and I've sadly come back to find there aren't any new levels. Maybe soon!

There are 15 Levels with eight waves per. It takes about 20 min to finish a level. Different combos of characters affect the tower's effectiveness. Also, different characters yield different products at workshop. Easy to play and experiment. Managing Priests (mana), kill zones and rearranging Towers are key.

One glitch... I've replayed the game at Hard and added +3 waves... However, on levels 12-14 the additional levels don't appear.

Im Gegensatz zu vielen anderen Tower Defense-Spielen, auch VR, hat Towers & Powers viele innovative Ansätze. Beispiele gefällig? Gerne: Es gibt verschiedene Einheiten, die kämpfen können (im Notfall) und verschiedene Türme bauen, wobei sie diese dann auch bemannen. Für Upgrades setzt man beliebige andere Einheiten drauf und erhält viele verschiedene Turmkombinationen. Das beste: Man kann jederzeit Einheiten aus den Türmen herausnehmen und alles neu kombinieren, an andere Bauplätze verschieben und sich so dynamisch an die Wellen an Feinden anpassen. Dazu kann man Zaubern, Barrikaden errichten und vieles mehr.

Im Vergleich zu Iron Guard, welches an sich absolut okay ist, das deutlich bessere Tower Defense. 5/5 - gebt dieser Perle eine Chance.

I’ve never played a tower defense game quite like this, the mechanic of mixing and matching different units to create specific towers. Also, when one lane is getting heavily attacked, you can reinforce it by moving units around.  It really does give the player more control and it should be used in more game. Glad I got this game. A sequel would be welcome.
I can't get past level 2 as the spell function is not working. Makes it impossible to move on...

developer_response.body: Hey there, thanks for the feedback! Could you please join the Towers & Powers discord community to give more details about the problem you are experiencing? The game does not have spels on level 2. You get to practise those on tutorial but they come to use only in the later levels.

reviews.review_title: The best tower defense I've played in VR
reviews.review_description:
I've been searching for a good tower defense game in VR for 7 years and this is finally it. Unlike most TD games you can build/dismantle/edit towers on the fly. Tower types are determined by the units you place on them such as monk, warrior, mage etc. Different combinations have different attacks and attributes so you can create exactly what you want. Edit towers instantly, no build time or cooldowns. There's also a range of magic you can use with gestures, defensive structures and even throwable objects so there's a great balance of physical immersion along with tower defense. 
This is surprisingly under the radar for such an amazing game, as a PCVR gamer this one of the few Quest games I love, one of my favourites overall and one I'll be playing long-term.

You might call DEMEO a tower defense game but this one is a more classical one. Also Iron Guard is an ok classical tower defanse game but gets repetitive quickly. Otherwise there is not much to choose from.

Thanks developers for taking on this genre it works well in VR.
A good solid tower defense, with lovely style. Not my humor but that's nothing to judge about. Principles are cool VR is integrated good ( would also work without VR)
Game is fun but not properly balanced. I don’t like the upgrade system. Needs some refinement to be good

Assessing tower defense game. Nice animation, character design. Loved the 'God mode' involvement.

Some feedback for devs:
* Could show a landing tracker for throwing cannons
* Make instruction clearer for magic spells (Make a single circle with your hands)
* Able to buy only peasants. Would be great if you can include the option to buy other types too (Monks, Vikings)
* Provide options to build more than 3 levels in each towers

Love these game and there's not too many on VR.  This is a bit easier than iron guard and some of the others, well done though.
25off,miketunes,com
Tower and defense good graphics just missing hand motion

It's in my top 3 tower defense game, including every platform. It makes you think and experiment, combining towers is a great idea. And the best part is you are not bored during a wave, you constantly have to deploy fences, cast magic, catch cannonballs or even reposition your troops. The difficulty is also excellent, hard but not impossible.

developer_response.body: We really appreciate your kind words and amazing review of Towers & Powers! Thank you!

reviews.review_title: To cast a spell just draw a big circle,
reviews.review_description: dont just go round and round. Good game, got it for €1.70
